reasoning: CSGP dropped from reference price of 70.51 due to Q3 earnings reaction on Oct 30-31. However, earnings showed strong fundamentals: 20% revenue growth (58th consecutive quarter of double-digit growth), upgraded guidance, and analysts maintained Buy ratings. The decline appears to be temporary margin pressure from recent M&A (Matterport, Domain) rather than fundamental deterioration. Probability increases with shorter horizons due to oversold bounce potential, while longer horizons carry more uncertainty about margin recovery.
